description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs. The front features a covered porch with columns, a main entry door, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the facade, while the rear includes a pergola-covered patio and additional outdoor seating area. The property is bordered by a low wooden fence and includes a paved driveway with a parked car. The house has a mix of traditional and modern design elements, with clean lines and a balanced window arrangement. The overall setting suggests a comfortable family residence in a quiet neighborhood.
description: A two-story white house with a dark gable roof, covered porch, attached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence. Features include symmetrical windows, a pergola patio, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entry, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, driveway, and partial view of the backyard with pergola and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pergola-covered patio, backyard seating area, and two large trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back door, additional windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a single main door under a small overhang
